subtitle.en: Build a clear long-term academic and personal growth pathway.
subtitle.zh: 建立清晰的長期學業與個人成長路徑

description.en: We help families understand the student’s strengths, academic profile, personality, interests, and future goals, then design a practical education roadmap.
description.zh: 我們幫助家庭理解學生的優勢、學業背景、性格特點、興趣方向與未來目標，並據此制定可執行的教育路線圖。

zh: 課外活動與背景提升策略

subtitle.en: Personalized guidance for private school, boarding school...
subtitle.zh: 為 4–19 歲學生提供私立學校與寄宿學校申請指導

description.en: We support families through school research, student positioning, application planning, interviews, essays, parent communication, and final school decision-making.
description.zh: 我們為家庭提供學校調研、學生定位、申請規劃、面試準備、文書支持、家長溝通與最終擇校決策支持，涵蓋小學、初中、高中、私立學校與寄宿學校申請。

zh: 家長溝通與擇校決策支持

title.en: Elite School Visit, Interview & Family Readiness Program
title.zh: 菁英學校深度訪校與面試準備服務

subtitle.en: Private school visits, interview preparation, school communication, and family decision support
subtitle.zh: 為家庭提供學校參訪、面試準備、學校溝通與短期安排支持

description.en: We support families exploring private schools, boarding schools, and international education pathways through in-depth school visit planning, interview preparation, school communication, and family decision support. This service may include school shortlisting, campus visit planning, student and parent interview preparation, first-round interview coaching, post-visit strategy review, and coordination of vacation programs, short-term stays, or student care when needed.
description.zh: 我們為正在考慮私立學校、寄宿學校或國際教育路徑的家庭，提供深度訪校、學校溝通、面試準備與家庭決策支持。服務可包括學校名單規劃、校園參訪安排、學生與家長面試準備、第一輪面試輔導、訪校後策略分析，以及必要時的假期營隊、短期住宿或學生照顧協調。

en: Elite school visit and itinerary planning
First-round interview coaching and mock interviews
Post-visit school fit and decision review
Vacation camp, short-term stay, and student care coordination
zh: 菁英學校訪校與行程規劃
第一輪面試輔導與模擬
學校溝通與訪校前準備
訪校後學校匹配與決策分析
假期營隊、短期住宿與學生照顧協調

image.image_purpose: Best match for school visits and interview preparation.

description.en: We help students build a strong application narrative based on academic performance, interests, extracurricular activities, leadership, personal story, and future direction.
description.zh: 我們幫助學生基於學業表現、興趣方向、課外活動、領導力、個人故事與未來目標，建立有競爭力的大學申請敘事。

zh: 美國及加拿大大學匹配策略
文書與申請故事線規劃

description.zh: 我们在大学申请规划中为学生提供 TOEFL 与 IELTS 备考支持，帮助学生提升申请与学术准备所需的英语能力。

zh: 英语语言能力考试准备
阅读、写作、听力与口语支持
面向申请目标的语言能力提升

subtitle.en: Academic performance planning for stronger grades and healthier study routines.
subtitle.zh: 提升學業表現，建立健康有效的學習系統

description.en: We help students identify academic gaps, improve study systems, plan course choices, manage workload, and build stronger communication with school and teachers.
description.zh: 我們幫助學生識別學業短板、改善學習系統、規劃選課、管理學習壓力，並建立更有效的學校與老師溝通方式。

description.en: We help students develop project-based experiences, competition pathways, research interests, robotics exposure, creative technology skills, and long-term STEM identity.

title.zh: 短期監護與學生照顧支持

subtitle.en: Stable and caring support for students when parents are temporarily away
subtitle.zh: 在父母短期不在身邊時，為學生提供穩定、安全與有溫度的照顧支持

description.en: We support families when parents are temporarily outside Canada, traveling, returning home, or unable to manage student matters in person. Our short-term guardianship and student care support may include school communication, emergency contact support, daily care coordination, regular family updates, and assistance with school, medical, or accommodation-related matters when needed.
description.zh: 我們為父母短期不在加拿大、臨時出差、返國或無法親自處理學生事務的家庭，提供短期監護與學生照顧支持。服務可包括學校溝通、緊急聯絡、生活安排協調、家長定期回報，以及必要時協助處理醫療、學校或住宿相關事務，幫助學生在父母不在身邊期間保持學業、生活與情緒穩定。

en: Regular updates while parents are away
Support with school, medical, or accommodation-related matters when needed
zh: 家長不在期間的定期回報
必要時協助學校、醫療或住宿相關事務
